task: Revamp frontend typography and Lighthouse quality
note: Homepage and docs were redesigned around a calmer field-manual typography system. Hero copy is shorter, headings/body rhythm were rebuilt, contrast/ARIA/favicon/image sizing issues were fixed, and Lighthouse scores are 100/100/100/100/100 for both homepage and docs locally.
